purpose: Application entry point: sets AppUserModelID for taskbar identity, configures DPI awareness, shows help if requested, then runs MainForm.
calls_out_to: AppCli.IsHelpRequested — shows help MessageBox and exits early
invariants: SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID is called before any UI creation so Windows associates the correct icon with the process from the start
PerMonitorV2 DPI mode is preferred; falls back to SystemAware if unavailable
gotchas: SetCurrentProcessExplicitAppUserModelID must be called before the first HWND is created — calling it after window creation has no effect on taskbar pinning
AppUserModelID 'BigFnJ.MatrixDesktop' must match any pinned shortcut's AppUserModelID to show the correct taskbar icon
